parameters.content:
## 🔒 GDPR Compliance Scanner

### How it works
1. Watches Google Drive folder for privacy policy uploads
2. Downloads and analyzes document for GDPR compliance
3. Extracts data controller, DPO, legal bases, user rights
4. Calculates compliance score based on required elements
5. Identifies gaps and missing GDPR requirements
6. Logs results to Google Sheets compliance tracker
7. Sends Slack alert if compliance issues found

### Setup steps
1. Create Google Drive folder for privacy policy documents
2. Get PDF Vector API key from pdfvector.com/api-keys
3. Create Google Sheet with columns: Company, Last Updated, Compliance Score, Status, User Rights Score, Missing Rights, Gaps Found, Third Parties, Has DPO, International Transfers, Scanned Date
4. Connect Google Drive, Sheets, and Slack credentials
5. Update folder ID and spreadsheet ID in nodes

### Perfect for
- Legal teams reviewing vendor policies
- Compliance officers auditing data practices
- Data protection officers (DPOs)
- Business owners ensuring GDPR compliance

## ⚠️ Compliance Checks

- Lawful basis for processing
- DPO contact information
- Right to access
- Right to rectification
- Right to erasure
- Right to portability
- Right to object
- Breach notification policy
- International transfer safeguards

parameters.prompt: Analyze this privacy policy or data protection document for GDPR compliance as flat fields. companyName, documentTitle, lastUpdated (YYYY-MM-DD), dataControllerName, dataControllerAddress, dpoName, dpoEmail, dpoPhone, hasDpo (true/false), dataCollectedList (semicolon-separated types of personal data collected), legalBasesList (semicolon-separated legal bases: consent/contract/legal obligation/vital interests/public task/legitimate interests), retentionSummary (semicolon-separated formatted as: dataType retentionPeriod), thirdPartiesList (semicolon-separated third parties data is shared with), internationalTransfers (true/false), transferCountries (semicolon-separated), safeguardMechanisms, userRightsList (semicolon-separated rights mentioned: access/rectification/erasure/portability/restriction/objection/withdraw-consent), missingRightsList (semicolon-separated GDPR rights NOT mentioned), complianceGapsList (semicolon-separated compliance issues found), complianceScore (number 0-100), complianceStatus (one of: Compliant, Partially Compliant, Non-Compliant).

parameters.jsCode:
const data = ($input.first().json?.data || $input.first().json) || {};
const fileName = $('Google Drive Trigger').item.json.name;
const fileId   = $('Google Drive Trigger').item.json.id;

const gaps         = (data.complianceGapsList  || '').split(';').filter(g => g.trim());
const rights       = (data.userRightsList       || '').split(';').filter(r => r.trim());
const missing      = (data.missingRightsList    || '').split(';').filter(r => r.trim());
const thirdParties = (data.thirdPartiesList     || '').split(';').filter(t => t.trim());

return [{ json: {
  companyName:            data.companyName        || 'Unknown',
  documentTitle:          data.documentTitle      || 'N/A',
  lastUpdated:            data.lastUpdated        || 'N/A',
  complianceScore:        parseFloat(data.complianceScore) || 0,
  complianceStatus:       data.complianceStatus   || 'Unknown',
  status:                 data.complianceStatus   || 'Unknown',
  hasDpo:                 data.hasDpo             || false,
  hasDPO:                 data.hasDpo             || false,
  dpoName:                data.dpoName            || 'N/A',
  dpoEmail:               data.dpoEmail           || 'N/A',
  userRightsList:         data.userRightsList     || 'None',
  coveredRights:          rights.join('; ')       || 'None',
  missingRightsList:      data.missingRightsList  || 'None',
  missingRights:          missing.join('; ')      || 'None',
  complianceGapsList:     data.complianceGapsList || 'None',
  gapsList:               gaps.join('\n')         || 'None',
  thirdPartiesList:       data.thirdPartiesList   || 'None',
  thirdPartyCount:        thirdParties.length,
  internationalTransfers: data.internationalTransfers || false,
  hasInternationalTransfers: data.internationalTransfers || false,
  transferCountries:      data.transferCountries  || 'N/A',
  dataCollectedList:      data.dataCollectedList  || 'N/A',
  legalBasesList:         data.legalBasesList     || 'N/A',
  gapCount:               gaps.length,
  rightsScore:            rights.length,
  missingCount:           missing.length,
  fileName, fileId,
  processedAt: new Date().toISOString()
}}];
